main_result: Using the 030 candidate-pair artifact and the 032 ranking artifact, the 11 filtered seed pairs reduce to a small symmetry-class table. Exactly one symmetry class contains the canonical oriented bridge pair [2,2,1] / [1,4,4].
scope_note: This extraction closes the finite class enumeration and bridge-class uniqueness step. It does not, by itself, assign manuscript-grade dispositions {closed,infeasible} to every nonbridge class.
